name: Pantry
description: A tightly packed storage room (despensa) next to the kitchen. Walls of @primary, floor of @floor, flat @slab ceiling — fully enclosed because the pantry sits inside a larger building. Three of the four interior walls are lined with stacked minecraft:barrel columns (2-3 high), with minecraft:bookshelf columns interleaved on the rear feature wall as recipe / ingredient labels. A minecraft:chest (or two on larger rooms) sits on the floor by the front wall, with a minecraft:composter and a minecraft:cauldron handling food-prep tasks. A hanging minecraft:lantern lights the centre of the ceiling, and a potted plant on top of one barrel stack provides a touch of greenery.

required_furniture.rule: Stack 2-3 high along the rear, right and back-half-of-left interior walls. Front wall left bare for the doorway to the kitchen.
Interleaved between barrel columns on the rear wall as recipe-book / ingredient-label shelves; at least 2 always.
On the floor against the front wall, centred. A second chest is added when AABB width >= 5.
Left-front interior corner next to the implied kitchen doorway so food scraps go straight in.
Next to the composter (one cell deeper or to the right); filled with water for washing produce.
Single hanging lantern in the centre of the ceiling, one row below the @slab lid.
Potted plant (poppy or style-specific) sitting on top of a rear-wall barrel stack as decor.

placement_rules: Dense storage: stack barrels 2-3 high along 2-3 walls.
Bookshelves between barrels for variety on the rear feature wall.
Lantern on ceiling for visibility (hanging, centred).
Front wall stays clear for the doorway to the adjacent kitchen.
Composter + cauldron occupy the left-front prep corner.
Chest(s) sit on the floor against the front wall, between the prep corner and the doorway.
lighting_ventilation: A single hanging lantern in the centre of the ceiling is the only light source — pantries are kept dim to preserve dry goods. Ventilation is implicit via the unmodeled doorway in the front wall connecting to the kitchen; no windows (food storage rooms avoid sunlight).

medieval.notes: Cobblestone floor under oak walls; barrels lashed with iron bands (vanilla barrel block reads as this). Potted poppy on top of the corner stack.

modern.notes: Quartz walls, andesite floor, smooth-stone slab lid. Barrels remain the vanilla wooden block (no modern equivalent in 1.16.5). Potted fern instead of poppy.

fantasy.notes: Mossy-cobble floor, dark-oak walls and slab lid. A soul lantern hangs in the centre (eerie blue glow). Potted blue orchid on the corner stack hints at alchemical herbs alongside ordinary pantry stock.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.pantry.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
